---
title: 'Chester Chittesh Jandihar - White Hat Hacker'
date: '2015-12-02T05:04:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '2979820041569858939'
blogger_filename: '/2015/12/chester-chittesh-jandihar-white-hat_1.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'White Noise'
  - 'Character Sketch'
---

<h3><br />Chester Jandihar - Hacker</h3><br /><br /><br /><h4><br />Getting into the background: Chester</h4><br /><br /><br />Chester Jandihar was the son of two parents that wanted him to achieve. He graduated college at 23 with a PhD in Computer Science and a Masters in Behavioral Psychology. He was working with a cutting edge research firm, on an intuitive computer user interface program, when he cracked from the pressure. <br /><br /><br /><br />He was fired from his job, as undependable. His parents didn't disown him, but they didn't understand him either. They keep their distance.<br /><br /><br /><br />He got into drug and alcohol addiction, until he nearly died in an accident where he wrapped his car around a telephone pole, and killing a jogger. He was sentenced to three years for manslaughter,&nbsp;rehab and ongoing community service. Which is where he met Ms. Wu. <br /><br /><br /><br />Since then, he's worked Freelance as a programmer, and he volunteers as often as possible at Ms. Wu's. <br /><br /><br /><br />He brings in people to his house frequently, down and outers, who he feels obligated to help in one way or another.<br /><br /><br /><br />He is the most centered character, and he wants to help others with no expectation of return. But he also afraid that non of his good works will ever atone for his sin or the life he took.<br /><br /><br /><br />He is now 32, and he meets Ash and Grace, takes them in, and got more than he bargained for. But he's all-in. <br /><br /><br /><br /><strong>Can he help them survive, without becoming a target?</strong><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><h4><br />**************************Old bio below, new bio above*************************</h4><br /><div style="margin: 0in 0in 0in 0.5in; text-indent: -0.25in;"><br /><br /><br /><div style="margin: 0in 0in 0pt;"><br /></div><br /><br /><br /><div style="margin: 0in 0in 0in 0.5in; text-indent: -0.25in;"><br /><div style="margin: 0px;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;symbol&quot;;">·<span style="font-family: &quot;times new roman&quot;; font-size: 7pt; font-stretch: normal;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span></span><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">Character Sketch Template (<a href="https://www.udemy.com/blog/character-sketch-examples/">Hints</a>)(<a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Now,_Discover_Your_Strengths" target="_blank">Strengths List</a>)(<a href="https://www.isa.org/templates/two-column.aspx?pageid=134103&amp;append=35734" target="_blank">Strengths details</a>)(<a href="http://www.16personalities.com/personality-types" target="_blank">16P-Types</a>)(<a href="http://www.16personalities.com/articles/our-theory" target="_blank">16P-Theory</a>)<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /></div><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">Hello my name is Amy Truthfinder, and I’m here with Chester Chittesh Jandihar from the White Noise series, to find out more about him/her and get a little behind the scenes information.<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><b><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">In the way of introductions:<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">Chester is a Supporting character in the book White Noise. He has chosen to side with the Good Guys, no matter what.<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">Chester was born on 01/01/1986, which makes him 29 years old as of 12/04/15.<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">He has the following distinct physical characteristics;&nbsp;</span>Brown eyes, Skinny, Indian decent ( parents came from a town new Punjab)<span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">.</span></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><br /><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><b><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">Personality and Motivations:<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">Tell me, what is your 16P Type, what are you top five Strengths finders results, and what one-three words best describes you?<o:p></o:p></span><br /><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;"><br /></span><br /><br /><br /><ul style="background-color: white; color: #252525; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.4px; list-style-image: url(data:image/svg+xml,%3C%3Fxml%20version%3D%221.0%22%20encoding%3D%22UTF-8%22%3F%3E%0A%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D%22http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg%22%20version%3D%221.1%22%20width%3D%225%22%20height%3D%2213%22%3E%0A%3Ccircle%20cx%3D%222.5%22%20cy%3D%229.5%22%20r%3D%222.5%22%20fill%3D%22%2300528c%22%2F%3E%0A%3C%2Fsvg%3E%0A); margin: 0.3em 0px 0px 1.6em; padding: 0px;"><br /><li style="margin-bottom: 0.1em;">Ideation - one who is adept at seeing underlying concepts that unite disparate ideas</li><br /><li style="margin-bottom: 0.1em;">Belief - one who strives to find some ultimate meaning behind everything they do</li><br /></ul><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;"></span><br /><br /><div><br /><ul style="background-color: white; color: #252525; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.4px; list-style-image: url(data:image/svg+xml,%3C%3Fxml%20version%3D%221.0%22%20encoding%3D%22UTF-8%22%3F%3E%0A%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D%22http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg%22%20version%3D%221.1%22%20width%3D%225%22%20height%3D%2213%22%3E%0A%3Ccircle%20cx%3D%222.5%22%20cy%3D%229.5%22%20r%3D%222.5%22%20fill%3D%22%2300528c%22%2F%3E%0A%3C%2Fsvg%3E%0A); margin: 0.3em 0px 0px 1.6em; padding: 0px;"><br /><li style="margin-bottom: 0.1em;">Developer - one who sees the untapped potential in others</li><br /><li style="margin-bottom: 0.1em;">Connectedness - one who seeks to unite others through commonality</li><br /><li style="margin-bottom: 0.1em;"><span style="line-height: 22.4px;">Intellection - one who enjoys thinking and thought-provoking conversation often for its own sake, and also can data compress complex concepts into simplified models</span></li><br /></ul><br /></div><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;"><br /></span><br /><br /><br /><blockquote class="tr_bq"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">I was last tested with an Intelligence Quotient (IQ) of 158. For those who are unaware, that makes me a certified genius.&nbsp;</span></blockquote><br /><blockquote class="tr_bq"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">I am an ENFP-A, with strengths in&nbsp;</span><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">Ideation,&nbsp;</span><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">Belief, Developer,&nbsp;</span><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">Connectedness,</span><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">&nbsp;</span><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">and Intellection.</span></blockquote><br /><blockquote class="tr_bq"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;"><span style="font-family: &quot;times new roman&quot;;">I find myself&nbsp;</span></span><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">energized by social interaction. My friends described me as&nbsp;</span><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">imaginative, open-minded and curious, which probably played a role in my interest in the sciences. I can be a bit more&nbsp;</span><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">emotionally expressive than some would prefer.&nbsp;</span></blockquote><br /><blockquote class="tr_bq"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">In group settings I find myself focused on s</span><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">ocial harmony and cooperation. It plays out in my developer and Connectedness strengths, always bringing them together in order to bring out the best in each person, and in the group.&nbsp;</span></blockquote><br /><blockquote class="tr_bq"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">I abhor schedules, I sleep when I want, go where the action is. I enjoy a good game of clue, and I spot any opportunity to get involved in&nbsp;helping&nbsp;others. My Motto is "Relaxed Non-Conformist".&nbsp;</span></blockquote><br /><br /><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">What does you name mean, and how has that played out in your life?</span><br /><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;"><br /></span><br /><br /><br /><blockquote class="tr_bq"><br /><span style="color: #252525; font-family: sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.4px;">It could be prophetic that my middle name,&nbsp;</span></span>Chittesh, means Lord of the soul. I was converted to Christianity as a youth while attending a private Catholic High School. Eventually, I joined a non-denominational church locally here in LA, CA.&nbsp;</blockquote><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><br /><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">What do you do with<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">time when you are not working?<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">What are the things you enjoy most in life?<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">What things just bug you to no end?<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">If every job, task, and activity in the world paid the same (and it was more than enough to have everything you wanted) what would you do?<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">If you could sit down and chat with person who is alive today, who would it be? What about anyone not alive today? What about a non-real person? What about someone from your story world?<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><b><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">Training and background<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in 0in 0pt;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">Tell me about your schooling. What high school did you go to? Where did you go to college? What activities did you participate in? Sororities / Fraternities? Were you&nbsp; in any other groups? Did you work through school, loans, scholarships, rich family?<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">Tell me about your major. How many degrees do you have? In what? Why that and not something else?<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">What was your first job? How many jobs have you had? What was your favorite job? Least favorite job? What do you do now?<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">Do you hold any licenses, specialties, etc.?<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">If you could switch jobs today what would you do? (Real and Imagined)<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in 0in 0pt;"><br /><b><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">Family history<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in 0in 0pt;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">What are your parents name? Do you know your grandparents? Do you have an siblings? Cousins, Aunts, Uncles, Other important relatives? Are you related to anyone famous?<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">What does your name mean, and why did you parents choose it?<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">Is there anything interesting or important or unusual we need to know about your family?<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">What was your relationship like with your Mother? Father? Others?<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">How is your relationship now?<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><b><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">Early Childhood through middle school<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in 0in 0pt;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">What experiences, growing up, marked your memory? In other words, what can you remember about your childhood, what stands out?<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">Who were your best friends?<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">Worst enemies, bullies?<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">What was your best day? Worst?<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in;"><br /><b><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">Here are some photos that remind me of you:<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in 0in 0pt;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in 0in 0pt;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in 0in 0pt;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in 0in 0pt;"><br /><br /></div><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><div><br /><br /></div><br />He is entirely supported by his technology freelancing, but does not see the point in saving as money is merely a social contract backed by nothing. Outside of his technology, he keeps a low profile, small two bedroom apartment (one bedroom, one office).<br /><br /><br /><br />Training and background<br /><br /><br /><br />He holds two PhD's from California Institute of Technology (Caltech). One in Computer Science with an emphasis in Operating Systems, and a second in Behavioral and Social Neuroscience (BSN).<br /><br /><div><br /><br /></div><br /><br /><br />Family history<br /><br /><br /><br />Parents xxxx and xxxx Jandihar gave him an american middle name to give him options for fitting in here in the USA. They are not actively involved in his life at this time.<br /><br /><div><br /><br /></div><br />He is Indian, his parents were first generation immigrants, and he was born in the US. They wanted him to have the best chance of survival in the US so they chose a name which would not have a stigma on applications.<br /><br /><br /><br />Early Childhood through middle school<br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br />High School and College<br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br />Likes, Dislikes, Favs, and Pet Peves<br /><br /><br /><br />prefers Mountain Dew and Monster drinks<br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><blockquote class="tr_bq"><br /><br /><br />California Institute of Technology (Caltech)<br /><br />Caltech’s Computing and Mathematical Sciences department is home to some of the most innovative research in the world.<br /><br />Graduate studies in the Computer Science program aim towards a Ph.D. and include courses in areas such as information theory, robotics, and operating systems. The core coursework and thesis necessary for the M.S. degree do not lead to a terminal degree, but are a required part of the Ph.D. program.<br /><br />The doctoral program consists of research, breadth requirement, a thesis, and a final examination.</blockquote><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br />Photos:<br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><div style="margin: 0in 0in 0pt;"><br /></div><br /><br /><br /><div style="margin: 0in 0in 0pt;"><br /><div style="margin: 0px;"><br /><br /></div><br /></div><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><h4 style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: Verdana, Geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 15.4px; line-height: 19.6px; margin: 0px; position: relative;"><br /><div style="font-weight: normal;"><br /><b>Comment on this post, or Hit me up on Twitter&nbsp;<a href="https://twitter.com/darrellwolfe" style="color: #149adf; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">@DarrellWolfe&nbsp;</a>,&nbsp;Google&nbsp;<a class="g-profile" data-gapiattached="true" data-gapiscan="true" data-onload="true" href="https://plus.google.com/106337514196493406365" style="color: #149adf; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">+DarrellWolfe</a>, Facebook&nbsp;<a href="https://www.facebook.com/groups/907869989282584/" style="color: #149adf; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">DarrellGWolfe</a>,&nbsp;</b></div><br /></h4><br /><blockquote class="tr_bq" style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: Verdana, Geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 15.4px; line-height: 19.6px;"><br /><br /></blockquote><br /><h4 style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: Verdana, Geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 15.4px; line-height: 19.6px; margin: 0px; position: relative;"><br />By&nbsp;<a href="https://plus.google.com/+DarrellWolfe/posts" style="color: #149adf; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Darrell Wolfe</a></h4><br /><blockquote class="tr_bq" style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: Verdana, Geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 15.4px; line-height: 19.6px;"><br /><i>Storyteller, Creative,&nbsp;<a href="http://www.16personalities.com/infj-personality" style="color: #149adf; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">INFJ</a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://www.gallupstrengthscenter.com/Purchase/en-US/Product?Path=Clifton%20StrengthsFinder" style="color: #149adf; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Intellection</a>, Ideation, Input, Learner, Achiever</i></blockquote><br /><br /><br /><i>* I may include "Affiliate Links" which means I earn a commission when you buy some of the products I link to.&nbsp;</i><br /><br /><br /><br /><ul><br /><li><i>See my full about page and disclosures:&nbsp;<a href="http://authorfun.blogspot.com/p/what-is-this.html" target="_blank">Click Here</a>.&nbsp;</i></li><br /></ul><br /><ul><br /><li><i>Also check out my&nbsp;<a href="http://authorfun.blogspot.com/p/affiliate-store.html" target="_blank">Resources and Suggestions&nbsp;</a>for writers (<a href="http://authorfun.blogspot.com/p/affiliate-store.html" target="_blank">here</a>).&nbsp;</i></li><br /></ul><br /><br /><br /><i></i><br /><br /><br /><br /><a href="http://authorfun.blogspot.com/" target="_blank">It's Author Fun</a>&nbsp;By&nbsp;<a href="https://plus.google.com/+DarrellWolfe/posts" target="_blank">Darrell Wolfe</a><br /><br /><br /><br />To Subscribe to the&nbsp;<a href="http://feeds.feedburner.com/AuthorFun" target="_blank">RSS: Click Here</a><br /><br /><br /><br />For Non-Fiction stories with a lesson by&nbsp;<a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/" target="_blank">Darrell Wolfe: Click Here</a><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><div style="clear: both; float: left; padding-bottom: 10px; text-align: right;"><br /><br /></div><br />
